practicals.title: Practical 1: Line Drawing Algorithms
practicals.desc: Write a program to draw a line using DDA and Bresenham’s line drawing algorithms.

practicals.title: Practical 2: Circle Drawing Algorithm
practicals.desc: Write a program to draw a circle using the Midpoint circle drawing algorithm.

practicals.title: Practical 3: Polygon Filling using Scanline Algorithm
practicals.desc: Write a program to draw a concave polygon and fill it using the scanline fill algorithm with a desired color.

practicals.title: Practical 4: Cohen-Sutherland Line Clipping
practicals.desc: Write a program to implement the Cohen-Sutherland line clipping algorithm.

practicals.title: Practical 5: 2D Transformations with Operator Overloading
practicals.desc: Draw a 2D object such as a triangle or rectangle and perform translation, rotation, and scaling using operator overloading.

practicals.title: Practical 6: Fractal Pattern Generation
practicals.desc: Write a program to generate fractal patterns such as snowflake, Hilbert curve, or Koch curve.

practicals.title: Practical 7: Interactive Graphics Application
practicals.desc: Create an interactive graphical application such as bouncing ball, moving car, or simple game using object-oriented concepts like inheritance and polymorphism.

practicals.title: Practical 8: Mini Project - Animation Clip Creation
practicals.desc: Create an animation clip such as animated scenes, character movement, or game cutscene using open-source tools like Blender, OpenToonz, or Pencil2D.
